analyst_note: Strong, detailed climate disclosure — SBTi-approved targets to 2030 and a SBTi-approved 2040 net-zero target, explicit 2018 baseline, full scope coverage, EY external verification. One MED (limited assurance level).

specificity.quote: Achieve net-zero emissions, reducing at least 90% of our carbon [emissions]
specificity.reasoning: Specific net-zero target with a defined reduction percentage.

metric.quote: Reduce scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions by 95% by 2040
metric.reasoning: Detailed quantified targets across scopes and interim years.

baseline.quote: emissions by 20% by 2027, as compared to 2018

target.quote: Our 2030 emissions reduction targets are approved by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi)
target.reasoning: SBTi-approved 2030 targets and a SBTi-approved 2040 net-zero target.

time_horizon.quote: GHG emission reduction targets through 2027, 2030 and 2040

scope.quote: E1.I1 Scope 1, 2 and 3 greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions
scope.reasoning: Scopes 1, 2 and 3 covered with scope-specific targets.

verification.quote: verified by an independent third-party, Ernst & Young
verification.reasoning: Externally verified by EY, but to a limited assurance level.

consistency.quote: We have a Climate Transition Plan, which evidences Inditex's [commitment]
consistency.reasoning: Documented Climate Transition Plan; no capex or lobbying contradiction evidenced in the report (fast-fashion volume-growth tension is a sector watch-point, not a documented contradiction).
